Evidence Level: Moderate

Fit Brains Trainer

Over 360 brain training games with unique focus on emotional and social cognition.

About This Tool

Developed by Rosetta Stone, Fit Brains emphasizes emotional intelligence and social cognition alongside traditional cognitive training.

How It Helps

  • Emotional cognition — recognizing and regulating emotions
  • Social cognition — empathy and perspective-taking
  • Memory — visual, verbal, spatial memory
  • Processing speed — quick-thinking challenges
  • Concentration — sustained focus exercises
  • Comprehensive tracking — performance analytics

Best For

Depression & Mood

Emotional training targets mood regulation

Anxiety & Panic

Social reasoning helps social anxiety

Trauma & PTSD

Emotional regulation supports recovery

Memory & Brain Fog

Traditional games address memory

Visit Fit Brains Trainer →

Alternative Tools

Other tools you might find useful for similar goals.

Happy Neuron

5 domains with personal coach.

NeuroNation

Evidence-based brain training.

Peak

40+ games with progress tracking.
